description: Universal Search API Router + Content Extraction (OCR/PDF/Video) + Find Similar + Search-as-you-type. Builds the HTTP-facing search API in the search-indexer service, content extraction services for PDFs/images/videos, a 'find similar' endpoint, and search-as-you-type with streaming results.
steps: 1. Create `packages/search/src/services/content-extractor.ts` - a service with methods: `extractPdfText(buffer: Buffer): Promise<string>` (text extraction from PDF buffers using basic heuristic - split on markers, strip binary), `extractImageText(buffer: Buffer): Promise<string>` (OCR placeholder that returns extracted text - in v1 returns empty string with TODO for Tesseract WASM integration), `extractVideoTranscript(transcriptText: string): Promise<string>` (normalizes transcript text for indexing - strips timestamps, joins segments). All methods handle errors gracefully returning empty strings.

2. Create `packages/search/src/services/content-extractor.test.ts` - tests for each extraction method: PDF with mock buffer, image returns empty for v1, video transcript normalization, error handling returns empty strings.

3. Create `packages/search/src/services/find-similar.ts` - a service that takes a document ID + its embedding (or text to embed) and searches for similar documents across all vector collections. Uses VectorClient to do nearest-neighbor search excluding the source document. Method: `findSimilar(documentId: string, text: string, options?: FindSimilarOptions): Promise<FindSimilarResult[]>`. Options include: limit, collections, minScore.
4. Create `packages/search/src/services/find-similar.test.ts` - tests: finds similar across collections, excludes source document, respects minScore threshold, handles empty results.

5. Create `packages/search/src/services/typeahead.ts` - search-as-you-type service with debounce-aware design. Method: `getSuggestions(partial: string, userId: string, options?: TypeaheadOptions): Promise<TypeaheadResponse>`. Returns suggestions from: (a) user's recent searches, (b) popular queries from observability, (c) autocomplete from document titles. TypeaheadResponse has `suggestions: TypeaheadSuggestion[]` with type labels (recent/popular/autocomplete). Designed for < 50ms response by using only in-memory data.

6. Create `packages/search/src/services/typeahead.test.ts` - tests: returns recent searches first, includes popular queries, autocomplete from titles, deduplication, respects limit, handles empty partial.

7. Create `services/search-indexer/src/api/universal-search.router.ts` - Fastify-compatible router class that exposes: POST /search (full universal search), GET /search/suggestions (typeahead), POST /search/similar (find similar), GET /search/history (user history), DELETE /search/history (clear history). Each endpoint validates input with Zod schemas, calls the appropriate service, and returns typed JSON responses. Follow the pattern of existing SearchRouter class.

8. Create `services/search-indexer/src/api/universal-search.router.test.ts` - unit tests for each endpoint handler: validates input schemas, calls correct service methods, returns expected response shape.
9. Update `packages/search/src/index.ts` barrel exports to include ContentExtractor, FindSimilarService, TypeaheadService and their types.
10. Update `services/search-indexer/src/api/index.ts` to export the new UniversalSearchRouter.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter @quant/search --filter @quant/search-indexer passes with zero errors
pnpm test --filter @quant/search --filter @quant/search-indexer passes with all new tests green
Universal search API router exposes POST /search, GET /search/suggestions, POST /search/similar, GET /search/history, DELETE /search/history
Content extractor handles PDF text, image OCR placeholder, and video transcript normalization
Find similar excludes the source document and searches across multiple vector collections
Typeahead returns categorized suggestions (recent/popular/autocomplete) within < 50ms design constraints
